name: Quiche Lorraine
recipeIngredient: ½ teaspoon freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the bacon until it is cooked through but not crisp. Remove and slice or dice.
2. Place in the pastry shell, adding Gruyere cheese and nutmeg.
3. Beat eggs lightly, then blend with cream. Season with salt, pepper, and Tabasco.
4. Pour over the bacon and cheese.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 30 minutes. Serve hot.
Serves 6.
Ensure to prebake the pie shell to prevent a soggy crust. Always bake immediately after pouring custard into the pastry shell. When using a Pyrex pie plate, reduce heat by 25 degrees. Test doneness gently shaking the pan or sliding a knife into the center; it should be firm but slightly underdone in the middle as it continues cooking. Allow to cool for a few minutes before serving for better slicing and setting of the custard.
